layers.mechanism: Text-extracted mechanism entities, relations, chains, and control actions.
layers.instance: Future production batches/events/observations attached to the mechanism graph.
layers.evidence: Source text, extraction confidence, prompt atoms, adjudication, and review metadata.
layers.application: Quality traceability queries, paths, warnings, and recommended actions.

node_classes.name: MechanismLayer
node_classes.description: Mechanism knowledge extracted from papers/manuals/expert rules.

node_classes.name: InstanceLayer
node_classes.description: Production batches, quality events, and process observations.

node_classes.name: EvidenceLayer
node_classes.description: Text evidence, model confidence, provenance, and review states.

node_classes.name: MaterialState
node_classes.description: Steel, slag, inclusion, solidification, or thermal state.

node_classes.name: ProductionBatch
node_classes.description: Batch/heat/cast-sequence node for future traceability data.

node_classes.name: QualityEvent
node_classes.description: Observed quality event or warning event.

node_classes.name: ProcessObservation
node_classes.description: Observed process variable value in a batch/event.

node_classes.name: RiskWarning
node_classes.description: Warning output from a future risk model.

node_classes.name: TracePath
node_classes.description: Path connecting observation, mechanism, defect, and action.

traceability_queries: Given a quality defect, return upstream mechanisms, process parameters, and control actions.
Given a process observation, return possible mechanisms and quality risks.
Given a warning event, return evidence-backed trace paths and recommended checks/actions.
